description: Legal fragment. In the hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe (1100-1138 CE). The names of the parties are purposely erased. Date not preserved. One man purchases a house which is located in Qaṣr al-Shamʿ (Fustat) from a Kohen. The house was owned by two parties, and it seems that one of them was the buyer of the other party's share. A gift/donation to the pious foundations' institution is also mentions (kitāb al-ṣadaqa). No signatures preserved. (Information from Goitein's index card and Weiss's edition.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
